scenarios.id: Precedence2 - On numeric values-[4] Numeric unary negative takes precedence over exponentiation
scenarios.description: [4] Numeric unary negative takes precedence over exponentiation
scenarios.query:
RETURN -3 ^ 2 AS a,
       (-3) ^ 2 AS b,
       -(3 ^ 2) AS c
